forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely later this evening. The chance of fog later tonight. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of fog later tonight. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower early this evening. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. The chance of fog later tonight. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. The chance of fog later this evening. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of fog later this evening. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of fog later tonight. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of fog later this evening. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Mostly clear. The chance of fog later this evening. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the evening then becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor early this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of fog later tonight. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of fog later tonight. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, becoming less likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of fog later tonight. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers north of Marla, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. The chance of fog east of Coober Pedy at night. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Mostly sunny. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of rain north of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Leigh Creek. The chance of fog south of Leigh Creek later this evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower east of Leigh Creek, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog south of Yunta in the early morning. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
